title: Native Config Overlay: Unsafe Permission Bypass Policy

blocks.text: This matrix refines the security invariant for `ExposesUnsafePermissionBypass`. Provider-native approval bypass is a policy surface, not a provider default.

rows: allow with single-task isolation and protected path gates
allow after CI isolation guarantee verification

blocks.text: Current execution meaning of "bundle allows": the provider unsafe bypass surface is explicitly present in `bundle.TrustTierPolicies[<tier>].AllowedSurfaces.UnsafeBypass`. There is no inference and no default allow.
